data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data encryption both at rest and in transit to ensure confidentiality.
data.technical_spec: Employs AES-256 encryption standards and TLS 1.2 for data protection.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust IAM policies to manage user permissions securely.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM service for fine-grained access permissions and two-factor authentication.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Comprehensive protection against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and AWS WAF integrated to mitigate DDoS threats.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes third-party audits and internal testing using AWS Inspector.

data.title: Incident Response Teams
data.description: Dedicated teams for rapid response to security incidents and breaches.
data.technical_spec: Trained to handle incidents following AWS Security Incident Response procedures.
